reconstruction_method: Greek-derived alphabet adaptation + Latin/Greek transcriptions/bilinguals + internal spelling variation/syncope patterns (Bonfante/Rix/Wallace)
scholarly_consensus: 4-vowel system secure; aspirate/tenuis contrast dominant; no voiced stops; syllabic sonorants possible (minority).
confidence_overview: medium (high on consonants/alphabet; medium-low on vowels/exact prosody due to isolate/sparse corpus)

consonants: p/ph, t/th, k/kh (aspirates); f s ś z (affricate?); m n l r (syllabic possible); h j w; no distinct b/d/g
phoneme_inventory.notable_absences: voiced stops (b d g absent or neutralized in loans)
phoneme_inventory.distinctive_features: initial stress → syncope/clusters; aspirate primary contrast; possible geminates/affricates

ipa_reconstructed.sample_text: mi mulu larisal (dedicatory formula 'I [am/gave gift] of Laris')
ipa_reconstructed.confidence_note: Consonants/alphabet high; vowels conservative placeholder; alternatives in Rix syllabic theory
ipa_reconstructed.alternatives: More syncopated later realizations; sibilant variants

grok_imagine_guidance: Commit to: aspirated puffs on ph/th/kh; pure vowels (i e a u); no voiced stops (use p/t/k only); initial stress. Approximate: clusters/syllabic liquids (like English 'button' n); rolled r if present. Avoid: modern voicing/Italianate or forced o-vowel. Flag: aspirate clusters harsh (Tuscan-like link); uncertainties on exact timbre — use crisp/neutral for generation.
tutoring_hooks: Etruscan had NO voiced stops (b/d/g absent) — unique among neighbors!
Greek alphabet adapted uniquely (added F-symbol for new sound).
Initial stress caused vowel syncope → wild consonant clusters.
We read it phonetically far better than we understand meanings (isolate).
Influenced Latin & possibly modern Tuscan 'gorgia' aspiration.

sources.author: Bonfante & Bonfante
sources.title: The Etruscan Language: An Introduction (2nd ed.)

sources.author: Rex E. Wallace
sources.title: Zikh Rasna: A Manual of the Etruscan Language and Inscriptions

series_planning_flags: notable_absences: no voiced stops — high-value tutoring hook
